description: The CISO's global dashboard tracking authentication failures is slow because it aggregates millions of raw SSH event logs every time it's opened. Log in to Splunk (http://localhost:8000) as 'admin' / 'SplunkAdmin1!' and optimize this by aggregating failed authentication events from the 'security_logs' index into a dedicated Metrics index named 'auth_metrics'. This aggregation must be managed by an hourly scheduled report named 'Auth_Metrics_Rollup' and include backfilled historical data from the last 30 days.
